message:
fix: ADR-060 Sprint 1 — hook stdin, learning loop, MCP tools, trivial fixes

Fixes 10 issues from ADR-060:

#1211: hook-handler.cjs now reads stdin JSON (unblocks entire learning pipeline)
#1209: recordFeedback() wired into post-edit hook (completes JUDGE step)
#1214: MemoryGraph enabled in memory-bridge ControllerRegistry config
#1287: auto-memory-hook.mjs uses createRequire + walk-up fallback resolution
#1256: Added .unref() to 6 setInterval timers (CLI no longer hangs on exit)
#1288: Doctor disk space uses df -P for POSIX single-line output + NaN guard
#1281: Registered 4 missing MCP tools (task_assign, workflow_run, mcp_status, task_summary)
#1289: MCP status detects stdio mode, reports "Running (stdio)" instead of "Stopped"
#1238/#1262/#1267/#1268: Closed 4 empty rollback incident stubs

17 files changed, 458 insertions, 55 deletions.
All smoke tests pass. tsc clean.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
